title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 22 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 22 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 22 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/12/2025
Dalian iron ore futures moved largely sideways today. The main contract, I2605, eventually closed at 781.5,an increase of 0.58% compared to the previous working day. Traders offloaded cargoes at prevailing market rates, while steel mills procured on a hand-to-mouth basis with few enquiries.
